titleStmt.title: SII 18.194: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 194. (B.K. No. 93 of 1933-34.) HONNATTI, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab lying in the temple of Nārāyaṇadēva.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in the [7]th regnal year of Vīra-Ballāḷadēva, Piṅgaḷa Pushya śu. [2], U[ttarā]yana-saṁkramaṇa, Sunday. The date is irregular. On the tithi given the week-day was Friday which corresponded to A.D. 1197, December 12. Ba. 2 of this month however was Sunday, 28th December 1197, and the Uttarāyaṇasaṁkramaṇa had occured on the 25th. It records the gift of an oil-mill and a house-site by Pōlāḷva-Daṇḍanāyaka and Rājādhyaksha Dāvaṇṇa to the temple of Kēs11vadēva of Hoṁnavatti.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē
traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya
saṁbhavē . svasti śrī vīraballāḷadēvava
rṣada 7 neya piṁgalasaṁvatsarada puśya su2 Ā
Uttarāyaṇasankrāṁnti vyatīpātadaṁdu śrī
matu satyarādhēyaṁ pōlāḷvadaṇḍanāya
karu śrīmatu rājādhyakṣa dāvaṁṇnaṁgaḷu
hoṁnavattiya śrīkēśavadēvargge nandādīvi
gege sabhāmaṁṭapadiṁ teṁkalu sarvva
namaśyavāgi koṭṭa gāṇa Oṁndu Ā nivēśaṇa
voṁdu I dharmmamaṁ svadharmmadiṁ prati
pāḷisuvadu Idakārānuṁ Aṁ
nyāyavaṁ cintisidavaru vāraṇāsi kuru
kṣētradalu kavile brāhmaṇa mātā
pitṛgaḷaṁ svahastadindaḷidavaru .
Digital edition of SII 18.194 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
